ChangeRequest.name: Protection arrangement derived data should be Protection arrangement received derived data
ChangeRequest.comment:
<!-- See: documentation on [Issues in GitLab](https://gitlab.sofa.dev/sdd-bird-team/bird-logical-data-model/-/wikis/Issues-in-GitLab) -->
### Overview The derived data entity type _Protection arrangment derived data_ must be renamed to _Protection arrangement **received** derived data_ and relocated from _Protection arrangement_ to _Protection arrangement received_.
### Contact person @Arjan.Bos
### Description of change request After the inclusion of the attribute `Asset encumbrance residual maturity band` as derived data of _Protection arrangment_, we added the role construct to the _Protection arrangement_. They can have two roles (currently): received, and given. The attribute `Asset encumbrance residual maturity band` is only valid for the _Protection arrangement received_ and because we are as explicit as possible in the LDM, we need to move the entity type _Protection arrangement derived data_ from the _Protection arrangement_ to the _Protection received arrangement_. And it has to be renamed to _Protection arrangement received derived data_, with a definition that matches the new name. The relationship type has to be renamed too.
### Summary of impacted LDM objects/attributes - _Protection arrangement derived data_ - _Protection arrangement_ has _Protection arrangement derived data_
### Model sketch: ![image](/uploads/ab4658b4b7fe9cc6f91e3669ac50be97/image.png)
### Before closing checklist - [ ] Assignee for review - [ ] Assignee to close - [ ] Any other actions to be taken
